name: CA Flock
description: Flock shapes — CA vortex distorts their coordinates
code:
// Flock shapes — CA vortex distorts their coordinates
caStream('tentacles').out(o1)

shape(100, 0.012, 0.01).repeat(8, 6)
  .scale(()=>0.5+Math.sin(time*0.3)*0.03)
  .rotate(()=>time*0.08)
  .scrollX(()=>Math.sin(time*0.1)*0.15)
  .scrollY(()=>Math.cos(time*0.08)*0.12)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.06)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.04)
  .modulate(noise(0.8, 0.03), 0.15)
  .color(()=>0.45+Math.sin(time*0.09)*0.25, ()=>0.3+Math.cos(time*0.07)*0.2, ()=>0.6+Math.sin(time*0.11)*0.2)
  .brightness(0.025)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.02)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.35)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.4, 0.02), 0.003)
  .modulateRotate(noise(0.2, 0.015), 0.003)
  .hue(()=>0.003)
  .luma(0.005, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.022)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.1)
  .out(o0)
